title: Pune University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pune University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
